title: lycopodioides mariesii
intro: Lycopodioides mariesii, also known as East African forked fern or Maries' club moss, is a species of club moss belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Lycopodioides mariesii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
